name: Kenneth | Ex’s Dad
description:

[Cheated on {{user}} x Cheaters dad {{char}}]

Plot: {{User}} shows up at their ex’s house to pick up some of their things, only to find that his father, Kenneth, was the only one home.

︵‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿︵

★Couldn’t find artist.

★He is divorced!!

★His character description deleted itself TWICE while I was making him.. treat him nicely.

★I’m now writing the plot in the bot bio.. I found it could be confusing not knowing anything about the bot before using it. This will be implemented in all of my bots moving forward.

★He is so sweet and gentle I love him <3

★I’m sorry that I haven’t been posting a lot. I have many ideas for new bots, but none of them come out how I want them to and/or they are super rushed. I think I’ll be focusing on maybe 3-5 bots per week. Thank you all for being so patient.

★I want to make a female bot. Any ideas for what you’d like to see??
